hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
if [ ! -f "$HOME/.claude/memory/ltm.db" ]; then
  CONFIG_REPO=$(find /home/user -maxdepth 2 -name 'setup.sh' -path '*/claude-code-config/*' 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  if [ -n "$CONFIG_REPO" ]; then
    bash "$CONFIG_REPO" >/dev/null 2>&1
    echo '[Bootstrap] LTM memory system installed' >&2
  fi
fi
